TestCase1.TestDescription: Verify there should be an error message for FW not sufficient for Peripheral (Ebus)(Disabled until device aquired)
TestCase1.TestCaseHeader: Verify there should be an error message for FW not sufficient for Peripheral (Ebus)(Disabled until device aquired)

VerifyMessage.MessageText: My Ebus - Invalid: Primary controller firmware not met to support the peripheral device - Please update the primary controller firmware to the latest version using Toolbelt and re-try
My Ebus - Hardware not found: The device at the <specified eBus id> is not found. Please check the device connection and retry.

TestCase2.TestDescription: Verify that, when physical panels have same ebus ID's , user encounters error at the time of deploy(Disabled until device acquired)
TestCase2.TestCaseHeader: Verify that, when physical panels have same ebus ID's , user encounters error at the time of deploy(Disabled until device aquired)

VerifyMessage.MessageText: EBP duplicate - Invalid : device id must be unique.

TestCase3.TestDescription: Verify there should be an Info message when an extra Ebus attached to Controller is not accounted for in systeminfo.json
TestCase3.TestCaseHeader: Verify there should be an Info message when an extra Ebus attached to Controller is not accounted for in systeminfo.json

VerifyMessage.MessageText: My Primary - Hardware found : Extra eBus devices found on primary controller.

TestCase4.TestDescription: Verify there should be an error message when Ebus device present in the systeminfo.json doesnt support the Primary Controller
TestCase4.TestCaseHeader: Verify there should be an error message when Ebus device present in the systeminfo.json doesnt support the Primary Controller

VerifyMessage.MessageText: My Primary - Invalid : Primary controller doesn't support the peripheral device.
